name: arcade1v1
description: Arcade de apuestas 1v1 sobre Base (USDC). Cada juego es un modulo enchufable.

scripts.typecheck:packages: tsc --noEmit -p packages/game-sdk/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/strategies/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/agent-sdk/tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:web && npm run typecheck:server && npm run typecheck:mcp && npm run typecheck:packages
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test && npm run selftest
